response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including Java and JVM-related work in past roles, but lacks recent, deep focus on enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — his current work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent tooling, which misaligns with the role’s core technical focus.
strengths: Demonstrated experience with Java in past roles (e.g., NI LabWindows, RIDE Capital)
Strong track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Excellent communication skills with multiple workshops and public talks on technical topics
concerns: No recent professional work on JVM-based IDEs, Spring, or enterprise framework tooling
Current focus is on TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure, not Java/Kotlin tooling
Limited evidence of deep IDE internals or language server protocol experience
